problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Deep. Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
